MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-15-26 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'S UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR ORDER INSTRUCTING CLERK TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT, FILED IN APRIL 2026, IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) MOVING PARTY IS ORDERED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS THE ABOVE TEXT VERBATIM AND EMAIL IT TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG PRIOR TO THE TIME SET FOR HEARING. NO PROPOSED ORDER RECEIVED. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO PROVIDE AND FOLLOW THE COURT'S ORDER. COUNSEL FOR THE MOVING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST DROP A HARD COURTESY COPY IN DEPT. 302'S INBOX. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)
